title: QA Engineer
description: Join Salesforce's Quality Assurance team and ensure our customers receive the highest-quality CRM platform. As a QA Engineer, you'll test critical features across our cloud platform, develop automation frameworks, and collaborate with engineers to catch issues before they impact millions of users. Work remotely while maintaining direct connections to our Ann Arbor tech hub.
responsibilities: Execute comprehensive test plans covering new feature releases and platform updates
Design and implement automated test scripts using Selenium, Cypress, or similar frameworks
Document test results and create detailed bug reports with reproduction steps
Collaborate with development teams to clarify requirements and acceptance criteria
Participate in quality metrics analysis and continuous improvement initiatives

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; degree in Computer Science preferred
skills: Selenium, Cypress, or similar automation tools

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision plans
Flexible PTO with paid time off guidance
Professional development opportunities and Salesforce certifications
Remote-first culture with occasional in-person collaboration
